snippet.title: ஆடி முதல் வெள்ளி 🔥 அம்மன் அருள் பெற கேட்க வேண்டிய பாடல்கள் | Best Amman Songs
snippet.description:
ஆடி மாதத்தின் முதல் வெள்ளிக்கிழமையில் அம்பாளின் அருளைப் பெற மனமார கேட்க வேண்டிய சக்தி வாய்ந்த அம்மன் பாடல்கள் தொகுப்பு.

இந்த பக்தி பாடல்கள் அம்மனின் அருளையும், குடும்ப நலனையும், ஆரோக்கியத்தையும், செல்வ வளத்தையும் வேண்டி கேட்க ஏற்றவை.

🙏 அனைவருக்கும் இனிய ஆடி வெள்ளி நல்வாழ்த்துக்கள்.

🌺 Aadi First Friday Amman Songs | Powerful Tamil Devotional Collection 🌺

Celebrate the divine blessings of Aadi Month with this soulful collection of powerful Amman devotional songs. Listening to Amman songs on the first Friday of Aadi is believed to invoke the grace of Goddess Mariamman and bring peace, prosperity, good health, and protection to the entire family.

This special collection features timeless devotional hits by legendary singers including Veeramanidasan, P. Susheela, S. Janaki, Pushpavanam Kuppusamy, Srihari, Sakthidasan, and Jayashree.

🙏 May Goddess Amman bless you and your family with happiness, prosperity, health, and success.

🎵 Songs List

00:00 Adi Velliyile
04:47 Maruvathuril Vazhum
09:37 Muthumari Pattu Chattham
17:24 Manjal Mugam
24:18 Thaye Unn Thayave
30:09 Kollidatthil
36:30 Patchai Pasungiliye
41:20 Sri Rangadesam
46:49 Sandhanappoo
52:52 Pournami Oliyai

#AadiVelli #AmmanSongs #AadiMonth #TamilDevotionalSongs #Mariamman #Karumariamman #BhakthiSongs #TamilBakthi #AmmanDevotional #Veeramanidasan #PSusheela #SJanaki

snippet.title: KALA HIRAN | OFFICIAL TEASER | BHARAT S. SHRINATE | AMIT JANI |
snippet.description:
KALA HIRAN - Official Teaser  | Jani Firefox Films
The wait is finally over! The highly anticipated teaser of KALA HIRAN, which the world has been waiting for with bated breath, is officially released worldwide today, July 17th.

About the Teaser
Step into a gripping courtroom drama that unravels a chilling tale. The teaser showcases the shocking cruelty of a ruthless hunter who mercilessly guns down two innocent blackbucks. The thrill intensifies as the courtroom trial begins, revealing dark secrets of witness intimidation and terrifying death threats made to a driver and his entire family.
While the film's narrative is a work of fiction, this intense crime thriller does more than just keep you on the edge of your seat—it also beautifully highlights the Bishnoi community's profound love, deep connection, and emotional devotion to nature and wildlife.
Release Details:
Get ready for a massive cinematic experience! Jani Firefox Films will soon be releasing the Kala Hiran movie in over 8,000 cinemas across the country and around the globe.
Stay tuned for more updates and get ready to witness the truth unfold on the big screen!

snippet.title: Bonalu Song 2026 | Theeru Theeru Thottelalla | Mangli | Madeen SK | Kamal Eslavath | Shekar Virus
snippet.description:
Theeru Theeru Thottelalla | Bonalu Song 2026 | Official Full Video

Celebrate the divine spirit of Bonalu 2026 with "Theeru Theeru Thottelalla", a vibrant Telangana folk song beautifully sung by Mangli, dedicated to Goddess Mahankali.

Experience the energy, devotion, and rich cultural traditions of Telangana through this special Bonalu festival song.

🎵 Song Credits
Special thanks to Praveen Goud Thuniki
Singer & Lead : Mangli
Music : Madeen SK
Lyrics : Kamal Eslavath
Choreographer : Shekar Virus
DOP : Kamli Patel
Editor : Hari Thota
Designs : Rana
Stills : VJ Rishi
Stylist : Rishi Chowdary
DI : Mãyasabha Studios
Colorist : Thiru Kundella
Production : Shiva Chauhan
Makeup & Hair : Swathi's Makeup Academy
Special Thanks to : Mahal Yelikatta village

If you're searching for Mangli Bonalu Song 2026, Bonalu Song 2026, Bonalu Songs, Mahankali Songs, Telangana Folk Songs, Ashada Bonalu Songs, or Bonalu Festival Songs, this song is for you.

🙏 May Goddess Mahankali bless everyone with peace, happiness, and prosperity.

👍 Like | 💬 Comment | 🔄 Share | 🔔 Subscribe for more Telugu folk songs, devotional songs, and festival music.

Lyrics
నెత్తిమీద బోనమెత్తికున్నది పల్లె 
నిండొక్కా పొద్దు వట్టి నిన్ను జేరెను తల్లే 
ఆషాఢాన అలుకు వోసుకున్నది పల్లె 
నీ కోసం పాశం బువ్వలొండుకొచ్చేను తల్లే 

ఎట్లా పొంగు లోట్లు నీకు అట్లే దెచ్చినం 
అ బొట్లా బొట్ల బోనం కుండలు సుట్టు జేర్చినం 
ఈగ పాయిరంగ పబ్బతి వట్టినం ఎల్లమ్మ 

తీరు తీరు తొట్టెలల్ల తీరాంగా గుసోని 
ఊరేగరావే ఎల్లమ్మ ఇరగోలలందుకొని 
జోరు జోరు పోతారాజుల వీరంగం జూసుకొని 
జోగాటమాడరావే ఊరి దారులందుకొని

చరణం:01
ఊగి ఊగి రావమ్మో ఉజ్జయినిమాంకాళమ్మో 
మట్టి చిప్పల మోదుగు దొప్పల మెచ్చిన కల్లు నీకమ్మో 
ఆగి ఆగి రావమ్మా ఆషాఢాన మారెమ్మో 
అంతురాల బోనాలన్ని ఆరగించ లేవమ్మో 

శికటి మావురాన శివసత్తు శిగాలే 
నువ్ గద్దేనెక్కితె అదిరె సాక్షాత్తు జగాలే 
ఎత్తి ఊరూర పేరైన బోనాలే 

తీరు తీరు తొట్టెలల్ల తీరాంగా గుసోని 
ఊరేగరావే ఎల్లమ్మ ఇరాగోలలందుకొని 
జోరు జోరు పోతారాజుల వీరంగం జుసుకొని 
జోగాటమాడరావే ఊరి దారులందుకొని

చరణం:02
ఆరే బైండ్ల కొలుపులు సీరే సారె ముడుపులు
బల్కంపేట ఎల్లమ్మ నీకు మెప్పైన ముక్కుపుడకలు

జోగినీల ఆటలు జోడు యాట జడతులు
గోలుకొండ ఎల్లమ్మ నీకు బంగారీవి తొట్టెలు 

గులాలు గుగ్గిలాలతో ధూపం బెట్టినం 
మా బలాలు బలగం నువ్వంటూ దీపం బెట్టినం 
పండ్లు పలారాల బండ్లు దెచ్చినం ఎల్లమ్మ 

తీరు తీరు తొట్టెలల్ల తీరాంగా గుసోని 
ఊరేగరావే ఎల్లమ్మ ఇరగొలలందుకొని 
జోరు దారు పోతారాజుల వీరంగం జుస్కుకొని 
జోగాటమాడరావే ఊరి దారులందుకొని

గులాలు గుగ్గిలాలతో ధూపం బెట్టినం 
మా బలాలు బలగం నువ్వంటూ దీపం బెట్టినం 
పండ్లు పలారాల బండ్లు దెచ్చినం ఎల్లమ్మ 

తీరు తీరు తొట్టెలల్ల తీరాంగా గుసోని 
ఊరేగరావే ఎల్లమ్మ ఇరగొలలందుకొని 
జోరు దారు పోతారాజుల వీరంగం జుస్కుకొని 
జోగాటమాడరావే ఊరి దారులందుకొని

snippet.title: 🌿 Ramayanam Parayanam Day 2 | അദ്ധ്യാത്മ രാമായണം | Balakandam | Malayalam Ramayanam #ramayanam
snippet.description:
🙏 അദ്ധ്യാത്മ രാമായണം | രാമായണ പാരായണം ദിനം 2 | ബാലകാണ്ഡം | Ramayanam 2026

രണ്ടാം ദിവസം പാരായണം ചെയ്യേണ്ട അദ്ധ്യാത്മ രാമായണ കിളിപ്പാട്ടിലേക്ക് ഹാർദ്ദവമായ സ്വാഗതം. ഭഗവാൻ ശ്രീരാമന്റെ ദിവ്യചരിതം നിറഞ്ഞ ബാലകാണ്ഡം മുതൽ ഈ ആത്മീയ യാത്ര ആരംഭിക്കാം.

അദ്ധ്യാത്മരാമായണ കിളിപ്പാട്ട് സംസ്കൃതത്തിലെ അദ്ധ്യാത്മരാമായണത്തിന്റെ മലയാള രൂപമാണ്. മലയാള ഭാഷയുടെ പിതാവായി അറിയപ്പെടുന്ന തുഞ്ചത്ത് രാമാനുജൻ എഴുത്തച്ഛൻ പതിനേഴാം നൂറ്റാണ്ടിന്റെ ആരംഭത്തിൽ രചിച്ച ഈ കൃതി മലയാള സാഹിത്യത്തിലെ മഹത്തായ ക്ലാസിക് കൃതികളിലൊന്നായി കണക്കാക്കപ്പെടുന്നു.

കേരളത്തിൽ കർക്കിടക മാസത്തിൽ (രാമായണ മാസം) ഭക്തിപൂർവ്വം പാരായണം ചെയ്യപ്പെടുന്ന ഈ മഹത്തായ ഗ്രന്ഥം ഭഗവാൻ ശ്രീരാമന്റെ അനുഗ്രഹവും ആത്മീയശാന്തിയും ധാർമിക ജീവിതത്തിലേക്കുള്ള പ്രചോദനവും നൽകുന്നതായി വിശ്വസിക്കപ്പെടുന്നു. രണ്ടാം ദിവസം പാരായണം ചെയ്യേണ്ട അദ്ധ്യാത്മ രാമായണം എന്ന നിലയിൽ ബാലകാണ്ഡത്തിന്റെ ഈ ഭാഗം ഭക്തിപൂർവ്വം കേൾക്കുകയും പാരായണം ചെയ്യുകയും ചെയ്യുന്നത് ആത്മീയ ഉണർവും കുടുംബ ഐശ്വര്യവും നൽകുമെന്ന വിശ്വാസമുണ്ട്.

Parayanam : Suma Suresh

🙏 Adhyathmaramayanam | Ramayanam Parayanam Day 2 | Balakandam | Ramayanam 2026

Welcome to Day 2 of Adhyathmaramayanam Kilippattu Parayanam, featuring Balakandam, the sacred opening chapter of the Ramayanam. If you are searching for the Adhyathmaramayanam to be recited on the first day (Day 2 Ramayanam Parayanam), this video is the perfect place to begin your spiritual journey.

Adhyathmaramayanam Kilippattu is the revered Malayalam adaptation of the Sanskrit Adhyatma Ramayana, composed by Thunchaththu Ramanujan Ezhuthachan in the early 17th century. Widely regarded as one of the greatest classics of Malayalam literature, it occupies a cherished place in Kerala's spiritual and literary heritage.

Traditionally recited during the holy month of Karkidakam (Ramayanam Month), Adhyathmaramayanam Kilippattu inspires devotion, righteousness, inner peace, and unwavering faith in Lord Rama. Its timeless verses continue to guide generations with profound spiritual wisdom and moral values.

🌿 In This Video:
📖 Adhyathmaramayanam Kilippattu
🙏 Ramayanam Parayanam – Day 2
📚 Balakandam
🕉️ Malayalam Ramayanam Recitation
✨ Ramayanam 2026

Listening to or reciting the Day 2 Adhyathmaramayanam Parayanam is believed to bring peace, positivity, spiritual strength, and the divine blessings of Lord Rama. May this sacred recitation fill your home with devotion, prosperity, and happiness.

A dread-soaked psychological horror: a devoted mother, a monstrous secret, and a son shaped into her own reflection. When the past refuses to die, identity becomes a curse passed down like blood. Atmospheric Indian folk-horror for fans of elevated, slow-burn terror.

The full film releases 25 June – only on youtube.com/@ChitraVichitraCinema-s3o

Produced by Maya Wandalkar & Vinay Wandalkar
